  Log:
  - Update to version 20.04p12 [1]
  - Project has new homepage [1]
  - Port needs USE_XORG+=xft to compile now
  - Use INSTALL_DATA and COPYTREE_SHARE macros instead of CP
    for proper file permissions
  - Add desktop entry file
  
  PR:             ports/165911 [1]
